scenes.narration: GATE 2026 mein Algorithms ke 8-10 marks pakke. Padh lo abhi.
Without understanding Algorithms, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Algorithms like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Algorithms: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Algorithms: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Algorithms to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Algorithms solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
